title: Stress Management
summary: Recognize stress and learn quick ways to bring it down.

sections.heading: Overview
sections.markdown: Stress is your body’s response to perceived challenges. Short bursts can be useful, chronic stress is harmful.

sections.heading: Quick resets
sections.markdown:
- box breathing
- 60–90 second cold water on wrists
- 10-minute walk
- journaling a single next step

sections.heading: Long-term habits
sections.markdown: Sleep consistency, movement you enjoy, and boundaries around work and screens.
